name: HOGE 1024-point NTT/INTT identity pipeline
description: Full-vector packed identity task that checks the composed INTT and NTT pipeline modulo the HOGE 64-bit prime.

reference.operation: identity modulo P after the internal inverse and forward transform composition

observable_contract.input: all 1024 coefficients are static on the packed input after reset
observable_contract.sample_time: the test samples output after 33 post-reset clock cycles
observable_contract.output: for every i, io_out[i] mod P must equal io_in[i] mod P

score.primary: minimize cycles to stable identity output
secondary: maximize fmax when synthesis is available
